title: pomaderris humilis
intro: Pomaderris humilis, also known as the low pomaderris or scrub pomaderris, is a shrub native to eastern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant's leaves and bark are used in herbal preparations to create remedies that can help alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats, as well as promote skin health and reduce inflammation. Pomaderris humilis can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, allowing for various forms of treatment and application.
